special_mechanics.name: Final Blow
special_mechanics.description: Special devastating punch attack that can KO opponent in a single strike when timed correctly

special_mechanics.name: Side-scrolling Boxing Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls boxer moving left and right on screen; standard boxing game horizontal positioning

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. This is a 1988 arcade boxing game (Final Blow) ported to Genesis in 1990. No precise physics parameters are documented in available sources. Game is a side-scrolling boxing title where player controls left-right movement and punch timing rather than traditional platformer movement physics.
